fields.helpText: The value of this field is an abbreviation that identifies the instrument that is being described in this entry.   Typical abbreviations are CR1, CT2, US, etcetera.
The value of this field is a description that identifies the equipment that is specified by this entry. Such a description typically includes the name of a building or the number of a room.
The value of this field is a code that indicates the kind of studies that is supported by this instrument.   Possible values are:    "RAD"   for Radiology    "CON"   for Consults

The value of this field is an integer number that identifies the TCP/IP port number to which the instrument connects that is described in this entry.   TCP/IP port numbers are integers between 1 and 65535.   The TCP/IP connection in question is between this instrument and the computer on which this table is stored.

The value of this field is a pointer that identifies the site where the instrument is located that is described in this entry.   The value of this field is a pointer to the Institution File (number 4, stored in ^DIC(4,...)
This is the hostname of the computer on which the image files for this instrument are stored.
